data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: ConsumptionNotFound
data.value: The consumption was not found.

data.name: GuestNotFound
data.value: The guest was not found.

data.name: StayNotFound
data.value: The guest stay was not found.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The amount must be greater than {0}.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The expected end date must be greater than the start date.

data.name: RoomNotAvailable
data.value: The room is not available.

data.name: RoomHasActiveStay
data.value: The room has an active stay.

data.name: ReservationOverlap
data.value: The stay overlaps with a confirmed reservation.

data.name: InvalidDurationHours
data.value: The guest stay duration must be a whole number of hours. The start time can be any minute.

data.name: Additional amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Additional amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Amount must be greater than zero
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero

data.name: Base amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Base amount must be zero or greater

data.name: DNI is required
data.value: DNI is required

data.name: DNI must have exactly 8 digits
data.value: DNI must have exactly 8 digits

data.name: Description is required
data.value: Description is required

data.name: Description must have 3 to 250 characters
data.value: Description must have 3 to 250 characters

data.name: Email must have a valid format
data.value: Email must have a valid format

data.name: Email must not exceed 250 characters
data.value: Email must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Full name is required
data.value: Full name is required

data.name: Full name must have 3 to 80 valid characters
data.value: Full name must have 3 to 80 valid characters

data.name: Guest identifier is required
data.value: Guest identifier is required

data.name: Guest identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Guest identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Guest name is required
data.value: Guest name is required

data.name: Guest name must have 3 to 250 characters
data.value: Guest name must have 3 to 250 characters

data.name: Guest stay identifier is required
data.value: Guest stay identifier is required

data.name: Guest stay identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Guest stay identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Hotel identifier is required
data.value: Hotel identifier is required

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Payment status is required
data.value: Payment status is required

data.name: Payment status must be pending or paid
data.value: Payment status must be pending or paid

data.name: Phone is required
data.value: Phone is required

data.name: Phone must have exactly 9 digits
data.value: Phone must have exactly 9 digits

data.name: Prepaid amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Prepaid amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Quantity must be between 1 and 999
data.value: Quantity must be between 1 and 999

data.name: Room identifier is required
data.value: Room identifier is required

data.name: Room identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Room identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Status is required
data.value: Status is required

data.name: Status must be active finished or cancelled
data.value: Status must be active finished or cancelled

data.name: Total amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Total amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Unit price must be greater than zero
data.value: Unit price must be greater than zero
